message:
feat(Python): Implement pymath.zig - IEEE 754 math utilities

Comprehensive math utilities mirroring cpython/Python/pymath.c:
- IEEE 754 special values (infinity, NaN, huge_val)
- Special value detection (isInf, isNan, isFinite, isSubnormal)
- Basic math operations (abs, floor, ceil, sqrt, exp, log, pow)
- Trigonometry (sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan, atan2)
- Hyperbolic functions (sinh, cosh, tanh, asinh, acosh, atanh)
- Special functions (erf, erfc, gamma, lgamma)
- IEEE 754 operations (frexp, ldexp, modf, fmod, copysign, nextafter)
- Overflow detection for add/sub/mul
- Integer bit operations (CLZ, CTZ, popcount, bit_length)
- Safe arithmetic with overflow checking
- Utilities (GCD, LCM, integer sqrt, power-of-two check)
- Complete test suite
